NAVAREA XIX 50/15
1. RIGLIST. CORRECT AT 25 0630 UTC MAY 15.
NORWEGIAN  SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.

72-00.6N - 020-26.2E     ISLAND INNOVATOR  
71-14.7N - 022-15.0E      SCARABEO 8
67-03.6N - 006-32.6E     TRANSOCEAN SPITSBERGEN
65-14.2N - 007-30.7E     LEIV ERIKSSON
65-01,9N - 006-52,5E     DEEPSEA BERGEN
    
NOTES: A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY  ZONE.
B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT  WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW
2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 48/15
